Teacher.title: Teacher
Teacher.description: Represents a teacher user in the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Teacher entity.

photoURL.description: URL of the teacher's profile picture, can be a data URI.

schoolName.description: The name of the school the teacher belongs to.

Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student in the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

teacherIds.description: References to Teachers. (Relationship: Teacher N:N Student)

qrCode.description: Unique QR code associated with the student.

schoolName.description: The name of the school the student belongs to.

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Represents a student's attendance record for a specific date.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Attendance record.

subject.description: The subject for which attendance was taken.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the attendance was recorded.

Schedule.title: Schedule
Schedule.description: Represents a class schedule set by a teacher.

teacherId.description: Reference to the Teacher who set the schedule.

startTime.description: Start time of the class in HH:mm format.

endTime.description: End time of the class in HH:mm format.

lateAfterMinutes.description: Grace period in minutes before a student is marked as late.

Grade.title: Grade
Grade.description: Represents a grade for a student in a subject.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Grade record.

subject.description: The subject for which the grade was given.

title.description: The title of the graded item (e.g., 'Chapter 1 Quiz').

perfectScore.description: The perfect score for the graded item.

definition.description: Stores teacher profiles. Access is restricted to the owning teacher (path-based ownership).

params.name: teacherId
params.description: The unique ID of the teacher, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

definition.description: Stores student profiles. Includes a 'teacherIds' array which denormalizes the teacher-student relationship to enable independent authorization.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique ID of the student.

definition.description: Stores attendance records. Includes the teacherId, denormalizing this value to allow for independent authorization.

params.name: attendanceId
params.description: The unique ID of the attendance record.

definition.description: Stores class schedules set by teachers.

params.name: scheduleId
params.description: The unique ID of the schedule record.

params.name: gradeId
params.description: The unique ID of the grade record.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to ensure authorization independence, clarity, and scalability for the TeachyTally application. It leverages path-based ownership for teacher-specific data and a membership map model for student-teacher relationships. This design avoids complex `get()` calls in security rules, enabling atomic operations and easier debugging.

*   **Teachers Collection:** Stores teacher profiles. Access is restricted to the owning teacher (path-based ownership).
*   **Students Collection:** Stores student profiles. Includes a `teacherIds` array, which denormalizes the teacher-student relationship, to enable independent authorization.
*   **Attendance Collection:** Stores attendance records in a root collection for efficient querying. The documents also include the teacherId, denormalizing this value to allow for independent authorization. 
*   **Schedules Collection:** Stores class schedules. Access is restricted to the owning teacher.
*   **Grades Collection:** Stores grade records. Access is restricted to the owning teacher.

This structure supports secure `list` operations by segregating data based on ownership. The `teacherIds` field in the `Student` document, and `teacherId` field in the `Attendance`, `Schedule`, and `Grade` documents enable filtering records for a specific teacher without needing to access parent document data.
